title: MODERATE: InputGroup border-radius uses fragile sibling selectors
description: M7: src/components/ui/input-group.tsx:20-22 — CSS uses `[&>*:first-child]:rounded-l-lg [&>*:first-child]:rounded-r-none` selectors. If children are in the wrong order or wrapped in a fragment/div, border-radius breaks silently with no error.
resolution: Added warning comment about fragile sibling selectors and documented direct-child requirement
